category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Jordan market (JSMO mandatory technical regulation + conformity certificate, adopting GSO/EN 149 FFP, Ministry of Labour occupational framework, importer-based market access via Aqaba).

title.en: China-to-Jordan PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入约旦（FFP）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入約旦（FFP）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626 / GB 19083) documentation against Jordan market requirements: JSMO (Jordan Standards and Metrology Organization) mandatory technical regulations and conformity certificate, Jordanian Standards adopting GSO/EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), the Ministry of Labour occupational safety framework, the importer-based market-access model, and the PPE-vs-medical mask boundary handled through the national health regulator.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件与约旦市场要求对照：JSMO（约旦标准与计量组织）强制技术法规及符合性证书、约旦标准采用GSO/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）、劳工部职业安全框架、以进口商为基础的市场准入模式，以及通过国家卫生监管机构处理的PPE与医用口罩界定。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件與約旦市場要求對照：JSMO（約旦標準與計量組織）強制技術法規及符合性證書、約旦標準採用GSO/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）、勞工部職業安全框架、以進口商為基礎的市場准入模式，以及通過國家衛生監管機構處理的PPE與醫用口罩界定。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Jordanian law, JSMO technical regulations, adopted Jordanian/GSO standards, and Ministry of Labour and health-regulator practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The PPE-vs-medical mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行约旦法律、JSMO技术法规、采用的约旦/GSO标准，以及劳工部和卫生监管机构的实践。本文所述的PPE与医用口罩界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行約旦法律、JSMO技術法規、採用的約旦/GSO標準，以及勞工部和衛生監管機構的實踐。本文所述的PPE與醫用口罩界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: FFP respirators entering Jordan fall under JSMO (Jordan Standards and Metrology Organization) mandatory technical regulations, which adopt GSO/EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3) as the reference standard, and require a JSMO conformity certificate before customs clearance and market placement (typically via Aqaba port). Market access is importer-based: a Jordan-registered importer must hold the conformity documentation. The Ministry of Labour provides the occupational safety framework for workplace respirator use. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not by themselves satisfy the JSMO/EN 149 conformity route. Medical/surgical masks are handled through the national health regulator, not the PPE route.
answer_first.zh: 进入约旦的FFP呼吸器受JSMO（约旦标准与计量组织）强制技术法规约束，该法规采用GSO/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）作为参照标准，并要求在清关及投放市场前（通常经亚喀巴港）取得JSMO符合性证书。市场准入以进口商为基础：须由在约旦注册的进口商持有符合性文件。劳工部提供工作场所呼吸器使用的职业安全框架。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告本身不满足JSMO/EN 149符合性路径。医用/外科口罩通过国家卫生监管机构处理，而非PPE路径。
answer_first.zht: 進入約旦的FFP呼吸器受JSMO（約旦標準與計量組織）強制技術法規約束，該法規採用GSO/EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）作為參照標準，並要求在清關及投放市場前（通常經亞喀巴港）取得JSMO符合性證書。市場准入以進口商為基礎：須由在約旦注冊的進口商持有符合性文件。勞工部提供工作場所呼吸器使用的職業安全框架。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告本身不滿足JSMO/EN 149符合性路徑。醫用/外科口罩通過國家衛生監管機構處理，而非PPE路徑。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon change to JSMO technical regulations / adopted Jordanian or GSO standards
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Official JSMO, GSO, Ministry of Labour, and Jordanian government sources are preferred; local PDFs are not accepted.
